summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (backend bulkImportInventory function) and REQ-2 (frontend CSV import section on AdminPanel). The backend adds the function with create/update/skip logic and a result summary. The frontend adds a CsvImportSection component with file input, client-side parsing/validation, loading state, results summary, and error messaging for bad headers. Nearly all acceptance criteria are met. One minor gap exists around backend-side row validation (diff truncated). Several unrequested features are also present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Rows with missing required fields (partNumber, partName, quantity) or non-numeric quantity/stockThreshold are skipped without stopping the import at the backend level.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend diff is truncated and does not show the full bulkImportInventory implementation. It is unclear whether the backend performs its own row validation and skipping, or relies entirely on the frontend to pre-filter invalid rows. The AC explicitly requires backend-side skipping behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: CSV template download button in the CsvImportSection component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a template download feature. The CsvImportSection includes a Download icon and a template download button, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Drag-and-drop file input in the CsvImportSection component.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires a file input accepting .csv files. The component implements drag-and-drop functionality, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Parse preview showing valid/skipped row counts before import submission.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a pre-import parse preview step. The component shows a preview of valid/skipped rows after parsing but before the user clicks import, which is an extra step not specified.

hallucinated_features.description: newRecordCount and newRecords fields in BulkImportResult backend type.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the result summary should contain createdCount, updatedCount, skippedCount, and skipped row details only. The backend type also includes newRecordCount and newRecords fields, which were not requested.
